verdict_summary: rev4 envelope still triggers ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR on POST /ai/v2/render-generation; outline card #1 renders as empty placeholder with no title/body; warning text NOT delivered to user.

evidence.console_errors_excerpt: [PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request | POST https://ai.api.gamma.app/ai/v2/render-generation net::ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR | Uncaught (in promise) TypeError: Failed to fetch (ai.api.gamma.app) | GET https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto%20Serif... net::ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED 200 (OK)

recommendation: rev4 2-event mimic STILL fails identical to rev2/rev3 pattern. ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR persists, suggesting the issue is NOT envelope structure (intro narrative vs direct ```md fence) but something deeper — likely (a) HTTP/2 frame-level corruption from APF rewrite (chunk size/length mismatch, framing bytes), (b) Content-Encoding/Transfer-Encoding header incompatibility, or (c) chunk timing/keep-alive interfering with HTTP/2 multiplexing. Recommend dev-side to: (1) capture clean #745 baseline HAR + APF-on rev4 HAR side-by-side and diff at HTTP/2 frame level (frame type, length, flags, stream_id), (2) verify Content-Length / Transfer-Encoding parity, (3) check if APF mid-stream injection breaks HTTP/2 DATA frame boundaries. Switch focus from envelope content to HTTP/2 framing layer.
notes: ai.api.gamma.app endpoint is in path_patterns=/ai/v2/generation per #753 — but observed failing endpoint is /ai/v2/render-generation (NOT /ai/v2/generation). Possible mismatch: APF may be intercepting render-generation (which delivers slide content streaming) instead of (or in addition to) the initial /ai/v2/generation outline call. URL path on Gamma SPA: gamma.app/create/generate/897yebt6rceixwh (a session was created — initial /ai/v2/generation may have succeeded but render-generation failed). Total cards=1 with empty body, 0/50000 chars. Console shows 4 errors / 1 warning / 7 info / 4 verbose. AUTH OK (logged into '장희 최's Workspace' implicit, credit: 320). HAR not captured (would require devtools network export step + AnyDesk GUI interaction, skipped to stay within 4-min budget). Suggest dev re-examine path_patterns to include /ai/v2/render-generation, OR investigate why rev4 (which mimics #745 baseline structure) still corrupts HTTP/2 frame stream.
